children.value:
These notes follow the historical path into quantum theory: from the puzzles of
classical physics through the birth of quantization, wave-particle duality, and the
Schrödinger equation, building toward the quantum description of atoms and molecules.
Mondays at the start of class
, beginning the second week; each assignment covers the previous week’s lectures. No homework is due in exam week 12 or over Thanksgiving. Both midterm exams are
. The schedule below is the plan. Dates for exams and projects will be additionally confirmed in class and on Canvas.
Degrees of freedom and classical vibrations
Weekly rhythm: homework covers the previous week’s lectures, and the four
are spaced roughly three weeks apart, due on Fridays of non-exam weeks. Each number in the Slides column opens that lecture’s deck; the full set lives on the
